results.rendered_html:
dhurīṇa (von dhur)
1〉 adj. zum Anspannen geeignet; m. Zugthier  AK. 2,9,65 .  H. 1262 .
— 2〉 m. Spitzführer: brahmavratadharāṇām  PAÑCAT. 187,13 .  HIT. 27,6 .
— Vgl. uttara˚, eka˚, dakṣiṇa˚, sarva˚.

results.rendered_html:
dhurīṇa, dhurīya a. [dhuraṃ vahati, arhati vā, dhur kha cha bā]
1 Able to bear or carry a burden.
2 Fit to be harnessed.
3 Charged with important duties.
— ṇaḥ, -yaḥ
1 A beast of burden.
2 A man of business, or one charged with important duties.
3 A chief, head, leader.
